summary: First-iteration E2E test of Shree Maa Baglamukhi Temple MVP. All 12 backend pytest tests pass (root, pujas, festivals, temple-stats, booking create+get, booking 404, donations create+recent, diya offering, prayer requests, newsletter dup, contact, Claude Sonnet 4.5 chat). All frontend critical flows verified via Playwright on public URL: home/hero/sections render, booking modal submits and shows MBN- reference, donation modal submits and shows MBN-D- receipt, newsletter+contact submit, Ask Pandit chat returns real Claude reply (~200 words with Sanskrit references). No console errors. No backend logger error (logger module-level so chat exception path is safe).

minor.issue: POST returns 200 (FastAPI default) instead of 201; spec mentioned 201 but tests adapted. Consider explicit status_code=201.

logger is referenced inside POST /api/chat exception handler but logger=getLogger() is defined at module bottom (line 281) AFTER include_router. Works at runtime since chat is called later, but consider moving logger init before routes for clarity.
diyas_lit is augmented by hard-coded +100023 baseline; not a bug but transparency note.

issues: Hero image overlay tone is heavy olive-green; some users may find the Sanskrit mantra row low-contrast on the bokeh background. Functional, but tighten contrast for AA.

action_items: Optional: explicit HTTP 201 status_code on POST /api/bookings & /api/donations
Optional: move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above route definitions in server.py
Optional: improve mantra row contrast in HeroSection for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (~290 LOC) is fine — well under 700 line threshold; clean Pydantic models with extra='ignore' guarding against Mongo extras.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in find queries — good.
All endpoints use async/await with motor — non-blocking.
All URLs in frontend use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js — good.
data-testid coverage is comprehensive across hero, booking, donation, diya, chat, newsletter, contact, navbar, festivals — excellent for automation.
Payment is MOCKED (no real Razorpay) — matches user choice; bookings & donations return synthetic refs/receipts. Highlighted to main agent.
test_credentials: Not applicable — public app, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed bookings/donations/prayer_requests/newsletter/contact docs via tests; left in DB (no cleanup needed for MVP demo). One AI chat session 'test-session-001' persisted in db.chat_messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 13 endpoints incl. real Claude Sonnet 4.5 chat. Reuse it as a regression suite. Frontend Playwright flow exercised: book-now-shatru-nashak → booking dialog → submit; cause-* → donation dialog → amount-501 → submit; virtual-diya-card → light-diya-btn; newsletter-form, contact-form, ask-pandit-fab → pandit chat. Public URL: https://baglamukhi-divine-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_the_issue: No defects requiring RCA. Single Playwright false-negative on diya success was a test-detection issue (compared full card innerText which didn't change since success/toast shows briefly outside the card); backend API for diya verified working via pytest.
